changes_made.description: Condensed skill from verbose multi-section format to concise Python-only code with ready-to-use scripts. Removed TypeScript examples and K-NN section. Added complete distance matrix and nearest point patterns.
Added critical rule: ALWAYS read existing input files, NEVER overwrite them. Added instruction to write a single Python script. Model was overwriting cities.csv with hallucinated data.
Minor wording changes. Model still computed distances in its head instead of running a script, producing 16x16 matrix with wrong values.

Restructured skill with CRITICAL WORKFLOW section at top: explicit 4-step workflow (read, write .py file, execute with python3, never compute manually). Made script-execution approach the primary instruction. Model followed the workflow and achieved 100/100 on both tasks.

key_insight: devstral-small tries to compute haversine distances mentally rather than executing code, producing hallucinated values. The fix was to explicitly instruct it to write a Python script file and execute it, rather than computing and writing JSON directly.
